metadata.description: Free commercial-layer tools for builders — invokable inside Claude Code. Build the tech, then sell it.

plugins.name: avatar-builder
plugins.description: Turn a rough product idea into a personified, research-grounded customer avatar — a named persona with demographics, motivations, channels where they pay attention, the riskiest assumption to validate, and 3 strategic moves (message, channel, offer) tailored to that persona.
